title: × opulea lucayana
intro: × Opulea lucayana, also known as the Lucayan plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of × Opulea lucayana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
